title: ototropis khasiana
intro: Ototropis khasiana, also known as Himalayan orris, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome, which contains orris root and has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ototropis khasiana include treating skin conditions, wounds, and oral health issues, as well as providing relief from fever and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the rhizome is often dried and powdered, then used in infusions, ointments, and other medicinal products.
